text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So, uh... next month is your birthday, huh, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, is it? I never remember.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa! She's so cool, she doesn't even care about
her own birthday!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Thanks for—uh, I mean—I-I forgot mine too,
till you said. You don't say, today's my birthday,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I heard everyone making noise about it... Happy
birthday.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean, it's not like I'm some kiddo who gets
excited for that! 'Cause I totally didn't even
remember it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (YESSS! Brian wished me a happy birthday! I'll never forget this day!)
